scripts.dev: npm run build -w @wangwang/shared && npm run build -w @wangwang/env && npm run build -w @wangwang/onetalk-adapter && npm run build -w @wangwang/database && concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @wangwang/server" "npm run dev -w @wangwang/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @wangwang/shared && npm run build -w @wangwang/env && npm run build -w @wangwang/onetalk-adapter && npm run dev -w @wangwang/api
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @wangwang/env && npm run build -w @wangwang/database && npm run dev -w @wangwang/server
scripts.build: npm run build -w @wangwang/shared && npm run build -w @wangwang/env && npm run build -w @wangwang/onetalk-adapter && npm run build -w @wangwang/database && npm run build -w @wangwang/collector-desktop && npm run build -w @wangwang/api && npm run build -w @wangwang/server && npm run build -w @wangwang/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @wangwang/shared && npm run build -w @wangwang/env && npm run build -w @wangwang/onetalk-adapter && npm run build -w @wangwang/database && npm run typecheck -w @wangwang/collector-desktop && npm run typecheck -w @wangwang/api && npm run typecheck -w @wangwang/server && npm run typecheck -w @wangwang/web
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build -w @wangwang/shared && npm run build -w @wangwang/env && npm run build -w @wangwang/onetalk-adapter && npm run build -w @wangwang/database && npm run build -w @wangwang/collector-desktop && npm run build -w @wangwang/server && npm run build -w @wangwang/web && node --import tsx --test test/e2e/*.test.ts
